title: CAMPS - 211info
text: YMCA OF DOUGLAS COUNTY CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth camps. 1151 NW Stewart Parkway Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Ages 3-12 for most activities Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 440-9622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-9622 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Douglas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the corner of Stewart Parkway and Harvey Street Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
